_comment: Archetype registry manifest. Add an entry here whenever a new archetype JSON is added to archetypes/. elicit.py uses this file to resolve --archetype names and to display the available-archetypes list on error.

archetypes.name: Industrial IoT gateway
archetypes.description: An internet-connected gateway bridging OT field devices (Modbus, BACnet) to a cloud backend. Typical examples: Advantech WISE, Siemens IOT2050, Moxa UC series.

archetypes.name: Connected consumer thermostat
archetypes.description: A Wi-Fi connected thermostat for residential heating/cooling control, with cloud connectivity, mobile app interface, local display and controls, and OTA firmware updates. Typical examples: Nest, Ecobee, Tado, Honeywell Home T6.
